title: KORBOND 6 Piece Sewing Machine Needle Kit– 3 Sizes – Regular Point – Storage Case – Ideal for Light and Heavy Fabrics – Crafting, Quilting, Dressmaking, Mending, Tailoring, Silver
features: With over 60 years of trading, Korbond is the UK’s no. 1 trusted brand of sewing, crafting & clothes care tools and accessories
6 piece set of sewing machine needles, suitable for use on all modern domestic sewing machines, Ideal for both light and heavy fabrics
Pack contains: x 2 70/10 needles, x 2 90/14 needles & x 2 100/16 needles
Manufactured from high quality hardened carbon steel to ensure the needles have appropriate strength and flex for fulfilling a multitude of sewing applications
70/10 Size is suitable for lighter fabrics, 90/14 for heavier fabrics and 100/16 is the heaviest in the selection
description: Product Description For the tailors the Korbond needle range is manufactured from high quality hardened carbon steel to ensure the needles have appropriate strength and flex for fulfilling a multitude of sewing applications. The construction of each needle is carefully inspected to consistently deliver a precise shaped eye and clean point to eliminate fabric snagging. For the crafters Korbond 6-piece machine needle Set contains a selection of the most popular sized needles in a handy storage case. A must have for any crafter’s sewing box. For the make do and mender not just for creating stunning projects from scratch, this kit has everything needed to fix and embellish your wardrobe, making your favourite pieces last longer and preventing fabric waste. Safety Warning Take care when using. Not suitable for unsupervised children. Box Contains 1 x Sewing Machine Needles 6pcs Manufacturer Contact Information Korbond, NG31 7XQ, UK. See more
